description.value:
Source: Ariadne's Book of Legends - Alpha v1.2, p. 78-81.

Level 24

Arcane Resilience

Starting at 24th level, you have resistance to damage from spells. If you already had resistance to damage from spells from another source, you gain resistance to damage from all magical effects instead.

Wizardly Recovery

Also at 24th level, when you use the Recover action, you regain one spell slot of up to 5th level.

Memorized Spellbook

When you reach 24th level, your Spellbook has become obsolete. You have memorized all the contents from your Spellbook and no longer require it to cast Ritual spells. You have all spells from your Spellbook prepared at any time. Whenever you add a spell to your Spellbook, you immediately memorize it and always have it prepared.

You no longer require an arcane focus to cast spells, using your mind as your arcane focus.

source.custom: Original en-US text from Alpha v1.2
